title: strychnos angolensis var. lacourtiana
intro: Strychnos angolensis var. lacourtiana, also known as the Angolensis tree or the Lacourtiana tree, is a variant of the Strychnos tree, a plant species native to the tropical regions of central Africa. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos angolensis var. lacourtiana include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as the use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
